task: Using the scout and knowledge-builder context, propose 3 genuinely different ASDL vocabulary/layering approaches for rewriting the SpongeJIT Lua SSA compiler. Each must respect COMPILER_PATTERN/PVM_GUIDE principles: semantics consumed at phase boundaries, source/opcode mechanics do not leak, residency separate from semantic SSA, runtime consumes flat descriptors. Do not evaluate them; just present distinct approaches and tradeoffs.
